docs.title: getAddress()
docs.text:
const address = await agent.getAddress();
// "addr1qz2fxv2umyhttkxyxp8x0dlpdt3k6cwng5pxj3jhsydzer3..."

docs.title: getBalance(address?)
docs.text:
const balance = await agent.getBalance();

balance.lovelace   // bigint — AP3X amount in DFM
balance.ada        // string — human-readable (e.g. "50.000000")
balance.address    // string — the queried address
balance.tokens     // TokenBalance[] — native tokens

Pass an address to query any address; defaults to the agent's own wallet.

docs.title: getUtxos(address?)
docs.text: const utxos = await agent.getUtxos();

docs.title: getProtocolParameters()
docs.text: const params = await agent.getProtocolParameters();

docs.title: getSpendLimits()
docs.text:
const status = await agent.getSpendLimits();

status.perTransactionLimit  // number — DFM
status.dailyLimit           // number — DFM
status.dailySpent           // number — DFM
status.dailyRemaining       // number — DFM
status.resetTime            // string — ISO 8601 UTC

docs.title: send({ to, ada?, lovelace?, metadata? })
docs.text:
const result = await agent.send({ to: 'addr1qz...', ada: 5 });
// OR: await agent.send({ to: 'addr1qz...', lovelace: 5_000_000n });

result.txHash        // string
result.sender        // string
result.recipient     // string
result.amountLovelace // bigint
result.explorerUrl   // string

Specify either ada (number) or lovelace (bigint), not both. Respects spend limits.

docs.title: sendTokens({ to, policyId, assetName, quantity, ada? })
docs.text:
const result = await agent.sendTokens({
  to: 'addr1qz...',
  policyId: 'a1b2c3d4e5f6...',
  assetName: 'MyToken',
  quantity: 100,
  ada: 2,  // companion AP3X (default 2 for min UTxO)
});

result.txHash        // string
result.policyId      // string
result.assetName     // string
result.tokenQuantity // number

docs.title: dryRun({ to, ada?, lovelace? })
docs.text:
const dry = await agent.dryRun({ to: 'addr1qz...', ada: 5 });

dry.valid           // boolean
dry.feeLovelace     // bigint
dry.feeAda          // string
dry.executionUnits  // object
dry.error           // string | null

docs.title: buildTransaction({ outputs, metadata?, submit? })
docs.text:
const built = await agent.buildTransaction({
  outputs: [{ to: 'addr1...', lovelace: 5_000_000n }],
  metadata: { 674: { msg: ['hello'] } },
  submit: true,
});

built.txCbor       // string
built.txHash       // string
built.feeLovelace  // bigint
built.submitted    // boolean
built.explorerUrl  // string

docs.title: getTransactionHistory({ address?, limit?, offset? })
docs.text: const history = await agent.getTransactionHistory({ limit: 10 });

docs.title: deployContract({ scriptCbor, scriptType?, initialDatum?, lovelace? })
docs.text:
const deploy = await agent.deployContract({
  scriptCbor: '59010100...',
  scriptType: 'PlutusV3',
  initialDatum: '{"constructor": 0, "fields": []}',
  lovelace: 2_000_000n,
});

deploy.txHash        // string
deploy.scriptAddress // string
deploy.scriptHash    // string
deploy.scriptType    // string

docs.title: interactContract({ scriptCbor, scriptType?, action?, redeemer?, datum?, lovelace?, utxoRef? })
docs.text:
const interact = await agent.interactContract({
  scriptCbor: '59010100...',
  action: 'spend',
  redeemer: '{"constructor": 0, "fields": []}',
  lovelace: 5_000_000n,
});

interact.txHash        // string
interact.scriptAddress // string
interact.action        // string

docs.title: registerAgent({ name, description, capabilities, framework, endpoint })
docs.text:
const reg = await agent.registerAgent({
  name: 'my-agent',
  description: 'Autonomous investor agent',
  capabilities: ['trading', 'analysis'],
  framework: 'langchain',
  endpoint: 'https://my-agent.example.com',
});

docs.title: discoverAgents({ capability?, framework?, limit? })
docs.text: const agents = await agent.discoverAgents({ capability: 'trading' });

docs.title: getAgentProfile(agentId)
docs.text: const profile = await agent.getAgentProfile('agent-id-here');

docs.title: updateAgent(agentId, { name?, description?, capabilities?, framework?, endpoint? })
docs.text: await agent.updateAgent('agent-id', { description: 'Updated description' });

docs.title: deregisterAgent(agentId)
docs.text: await agent.deregisterAgent('agent-id');

docs.title: transferAgent(agentId, newOwnerAddress)
docs.text: await agent.transferAgent('agent-id', 'addr1qz...');

docs.title: messageAgent(agentId, { type, payload })
docs.text:
await agent.messageAgent('agent-id', {
  type: 'request',
  payload: { action: 'analyze', target: 'AP3X/USD' },
});
